ads.author: Aashish Desai
ads.title: Video game machine
ads.description: Custom-built arcade cabinet with Multi-Pac branding. This black wooden unit has a dual-joystick control panel with a central trackball and multiple action buttons. The interior contains a window based system, a dedicated volume control module, and a computer motherboard for running multiple classic games. It includes a standard coin door and a large glass-covered monitor. NOTE: The hard drive crashed and I cannot play the games. This would be a great item for an avid video gamer who knows how to repair these systems. I bought it for $2500. It has wheels and handles at the top to move it around.

ads.author: Marion Zachary Allen
ads.title: Hokus Pokus Pinball Machine
ads.description: Up for sale is a Bally Hokus Pokus pinball machine in great display condition. This is a genuine electromechanical (EM) machine from the early 1970s featuring the original backglass artwork, playfield, and cabinet. Great addition to a game room, man cave, bar, or any vintage arcade collector’s setup. These old Bally machines have a charm that modern games just can’t match. Original backglass intact Playfield present and complete Coin-op cabinet with original coin doors Classic EM gameplay – no circuit boards to worry about
